content.en:
"Breaking through the Origin Origin Middle Realm to the Origin Upper Realm, you will absorb the energy of the Origin of the Land on the other side of eternity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He looked at the phantom of the Lord of Ice and Rain, and the vision, and immediately turned back.

Looking at this situation, if the Lord of Ice and Rain wants to break through to the Origin Upper Realm, I am afraid that it will take a long time.

There's no point in him waiting here or watching the excitement, so let's go back and cultivate.

Eternal Origin Circle.

Ye Tian returned here to continue cultivating and comprehending the Origin Rules of the Other Side.

Time passed slowly.

this day.

The Lord of Ice and Rain has finally broken through.

In an instant, the endless coercion centered on the Ice Rain Island and radiated towards the surroundings, and all the Heavenly Ancestors sensed the Origin Upper Realm aura that the Lord of Ice Rain had just broken through.

This breath is terrifying!

"Congratulations to the Lord of Ice and Rain for breaking through the Origin Realm!"

Voices poured in from all directions.

And with the breakthrough of the Lord of Ice and Rain, it also means that the four Origin Ascending Realms were born on Wind Tooth Island.

Moreover, the Origin Upper Realm is not suitable to serve as the sub-island owner, and will automatically become the deputy island master of the entire Wind Tooth Island.

In other words, the Lord of Ice and Rain will soon cease to be the owner of Ice Rain Island, and the island will soon change its name.

As for who will become the owner of Frost Rain Island, it will be up to the Lord of Frost to decide.

Anyway, it has nothing to do with Ye Tian, he is too weak now to compete for the position of the owner of any sub-island of Fengya Island.

......

Soon, the Lord of Ice and Rain went out of the customs and went to attend the Lord's meeting.

Soon after, the Lord of Ice Rain returned and convened a meeting of Ice Rain Island, and Ye Tian also came out of the Eternal Origin Array.

meeting.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said, "Everyone, I am about to take up the position of Floating Island Master of Wind Tooth Island, and Ice Rain Island is about to change its owner. Moreover, I will not take everything on Icy Rain Island and leave it to the next owner. "

Hearing this, several of the Origin Middle Realm of Icy Rain Island were a little expectant.

They hope that they can become the owners of Frost Island, so that they will have access to more resources and power than they used to be.

However, to their disappointment, none of them became the next owner of Storm Island.

"The next island lord will be the lord of Qingyun!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain announced.

When several Origin Middle Heavenly Ancestors heard this, they were immediately a little unconvinced.

One of the Heavenly Ancestors in the middle of the Origin - the Lord of Ansan asked, "Lord of Ice Rain, why let the Lord of Qingyun serve as the Lord of Ice Rain Island, we can too!"

"Your strength is too low!"

The Lord of Ice Rain shook his head.

"The Lord of Qingyun is just a little stronger than us. "The Lord of Ansan is not convinced.

"The Lord of Qingyun is just low-key, it doesn't mean that his strength is only a little stronger than you, you don't believe it, you can challenge the Lord of Qingyun. With your strength, you can't stop a few moves from besieging the Lord of Qingyun together. The Lord of Ice and Rain said.

They didn't believe the Lord of Ansan, so they immediately went to challenge the Lord of Qingyun.

Ye Tian didn't know what happened next, but soon after, Icy Rain Island was renamed Qingyun Island.

The Lord of Qingyun became the owner of the island.

Obviously, the Lord of Ansan is indeed far inferior to the Lord of Qingyun.

This is also the reason why the Lord of Ice and Rain chose the Lord of Qingyun.

Fengya Island has high requirements for the strength of the island owner, and if the strength is not good, even if the position of the island owner is empty, it will not be given indiscriminately.

Since the Lord of Ice and Rain didn't take anything away from Qingyun Island, Ye Tian's treatment still didn't decrease.

Therefore, for Ye Tian, changing the owner has little impact.

Moreover, in the future, the Lord of Ice and Rain will also favor Qingyun Island, and a lot of resources will be given.

Therefore, none of the other shore-level geniuses on Qingyun Island would have any opinions.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Eternal Origin Array was up to time.

Click!

The Eternal Origin Circle was completely shattered, and it had been maintained for more than 80,000 eternal years.

As the Eternal Origin Array shattered, Ye Tian came out of the retreat.

At this moment, his Origin Law on the other side is much higher than the previous realm, mainly because the effect of the Origin Black Mud is very good, making his comprehension speed skyrocket.

He went to the Peer Rule's Tablet and tested his Origin Rule Realm on the Other Shore.

【42】

As soon as this number appeared, it meant that Ye Tian's other side origin rules had reached the realm of forty out of two, which was far beyond before!

And his other side origin is naturally skyrocketing, although it is still in the late stage of the origin and lower realm, but it far exceeds the number of three thousand, reaching more than seven thousand, this is the extent of the improvement of the other side of the origin after the rules of the other side of the origin are improved.

For the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm, the improvement of the Origin Rules on the other side can quickly improve the Origin of the Other Shore, and the use of other resources to improve will not be too fast.

Of course.

If you obtain a supreme treasure that surpasses the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side, you can indeed quickly improve the origin of the other side, but how rare that kind of treasure is, any force will want it!

Afterwards.

Ye Tian built another Eternal Origin Array, and spent another hundred and ninety-nine thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

These high-grade eternal ancient golds were all found in the Hades Mansion in the more than 80,000 primeval eras.

It was useless for him to keep these high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, so he naturally wanted to build another Eternal Origin Array, so as to comprehend the Origin Rules on the other side.

Soon, the second Eternal Origin Circle was successfully constructed, once again shocking many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island, and they were all dumbfounded.

"The Endless Lord has successfully built the Eternal Origin Array, which is equivalent to spending more than 200,000 high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold!"

The Lord of Qingyun was slightly surprised.

However, he was not envious.

After all, the Eternal Origin Array was of no use to him now, not only him, but those top-notch Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors couldn't use the Eternal Origin Array.

......

Another long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found that when he was comprehending the Origin Array, the Origin Rules on the other side could not be improved a little more, as if he had fallen into a bottleneck.

He thought that he could break through the bottleneck with time, but who knew that after thousands of primeval eras, it was still useless.

Gradually, he became impatient.

However, he still stabilized his state of mind and came out of the Eternal Origin Array.

He was going to consult the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

The Lord of Ice and Rain is now elusive and difficult to contact, so he did not consult the Lord of Ice and Rain, but came to the palace of the Lord of Qingyun.

Now, the Lord of Qingyun is the owner of his island, so naturally if there is a problem, please consult the Lord of Qingyun.

Soon, he met the Lord of Qingyun.

"Lord of Endless, what's the matter?"

The Lord of Qingyun asked. ~
